title: melicope crispula
intro: Melicope crispula is a species of flowering plant in the family Rutaceae, commonly known as the Rough-leaved Melicope or Rough-leaved Citrus Bush. This plant is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Melicope crispula include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and soothe digestive problems. The plant is often prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, as well as being used in topical applications such as creams and ointments.
